current_bf16_one_run_decode_sanity.note: Current same-session BF16 one-runs were used only as decode sanity. Absolute ungraphed prefill/warmup timings in this shell were launch-path contaminated and are not retained prefill claims.

decision.prefill_note: The post-mirror 3-run raw JSON shows very slow absolute prefill/warmup values in this shell for both BF16 sanity and INT8. Treat those prefill numbers as contaminated diagnostics; compare decode replay and IDs only until the launch-path anomaly is isolated.
decision.reason: Short-gate correctness is restored and graph decode is within about 0.4-1.2% of the prior BF16 baseline, so no immediate short-gate decode optimization is required. The path remains opt-in/no-hold because the 8192-token BF16 mirror is a correctness guard and the long-context INT8-only path still needs a separate correctness gate before promotion.
